nasb.text: Then work on the house of God in Jerusalem ceased, and it was stopped until the second year of the reign of Darius king of Persia.

esv.text: Then the work on the house of God that is in Jerusalem stopped, and it ceased until the second year of the reign of Darius king of Persia.

cnv.text: 所以，在耶路撒冷的神殿的工程就停止了，直到波斯王大利烏在位的第二年。

ccb.text: 于是，耶路撒冷上帝殿的重建工程停止了，一直停到波斯王大流士第二年。
